bird.name: 白尾麦鸡
bird.summary: 白尾麦鸡（台湾作白尾長腳麥雞）（学名：Vanellus leucurus），是鸻形目鸻科的一种鸟类。 特征 白尾麦鸡体重约132克，翼长约171.4毫米，嘴峰长约33.5毫米，喙宽度约4.1毫米，喙厚度约5.1毫米，跗蹠长约70.5毫米，尾长约74.4毫米。白尾麦鸡是候鸟，其栖…

relations.subject: 白尾麦鸡
relations.evidence: In some parts of its distribution range the species faces threats related to habitat destruction and unintentional poaching. The white-tailed lapwing is one of the species to which the Agreement on the Conservation of African-Eurasian Migratory Waterbirds (AEWA) applies
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 白尾麦鸡
relations.evidence: In some parts of its distribution range the species faces threats related to habitat destruction and unintentional poaching. The white-tailed lapwing is one of the species to which the Agreement on the Conservation of African-Eurasian Migratory Waterbirds (AEWA) applies
relations.object_summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。
